category_sources: Official README describes a command-line tool recreating the data decryption effect from the movie Sneakers.
source_facts.description says it recreates the SETEC ASTRONOMY effect from Sneakers.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses No More Secrets.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, command-line options, and library information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/bartobri/no-more-secrets; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes piped text animation, ANSI/VT100 terminal sequences, and nms/sneakers commands.
source_facts.description identifies the Sneakers terminal effect.
